title: tephrosia strigosa
intro: Tephrosia strigosa, also known as the hairy tephrosia or hairy bean trefoil, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is a shrub or small tree that has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant has been used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Tephrosia strigosa can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and poultices, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine.
